summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MASS INTERIORS final completion phase. All core functionality working correctly including homepage sections, navigation, smooth scrolling, mobile menu, form validation, submission states, and SEO meta tags. Minor issues with some page content selectors but overall excellent functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Some page content selectors may need adjustment - About page 'BUILDING INDIA'S FUTURE' text not found, Compare page 'Board Selector' text not found

passed_tests: Homepage loads with app container, hero section, and lead form section
Hero title displays correctly: 'ENGINEERED INTERIORS. BUILT TO LAST.'
Navigation bar loads with all required links: About, Solutions, Compare, Portfolio, Contact
Hero CTA 'Request BOQ' button works with smooth scroll to contact form
Hero CTA 'Explore Systems' button works with smooth scroll
Navbar 'Get Quote' button works with smooth scroll to contact form
Mobile menu toggle button works and opens mobile menu correctly
Mobile menu displays all navigation links properly
Mobile menu has proper styling and animations
Form validation works for required fields (name, email, phone)
Form shows proper error messages: 'Name is required', 'Email is required', 'Phone number is required'
Form validates email format with browser validation tooltip
Form submission works with 1.5s loading state showing 'Submitting...'
Form shows success message 'INQUIRY RECEIVED' after submission
Form data properly logged to console as intended (mocked API)
Navigation to /about page works correctly
Navigation to /solutions/fire-rated-partitions page works
Footer loads and displays correctly
Footer solution links are present and functional
SEO meta tags present: title, description, keywords, Open Graph tags
Page title: 'MASS INTERIORS | Premium Dry Construction Systems | Raipur, India'
Meta description includes key business information
Meta keywords include relevant construction terms
Open Graph title properly set for social media sharing
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Some page content text selectors may need verification for About and Compare pages, but core functionality is working well
